SEARCH
Package com.example.eventplanner

Class LocationRepository

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventplanner.LocationRepository
public class LocationRepository extends Object
Repository for reading and writing attendee location data. Firestore path: events/{eventId}/attendee_locations/{deviceId} Call updateLocation(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, double, double, com.example.eventplanner.LocationRepository.SimpleCallback) whenever the device's position changes. Call removeLocation(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, com.example.eventplanner.LocationRepository.SimpleCallback) when the attendee leaves the event or stops tracking. Call listenToLocations(java.lang.String, com.example.eventplanner.LocationRepository.LocationsCallback) from the organizer dashboard to observe all attendee positions.

  • Constructor Details

    • LocationRepository

      public LocationRepository()

  • Method Details

    • updateLocation

      public void updateLocation(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String deviceId, double lat, double lng, @NonNull LocationRepository.SimpleCallback cb)
      Writes or updates the caller's location for the given event. Safe to call on every FusedLocationProvider update — uses set() with merge so it creates the document if missing and overwrites if present.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the event to associate the location with
      deviceId - the attendee's device ID (used as the document ID)
      lat - current latitude
      lng - current longitude
      cb - success/failure callback

    • removeLocation

      public void removeLocation(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull String deviceId, @NonNull LocationRepository.SimpleCallback cb)
      Removes the attendee's location document from the subcollection. Should be called when the user leaves the waitlist, the event ends, or the user explicitly revokes location sharing.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the event the attendee belongs to
      deviceId - the attendee's device ID
      cb - success/failure callback

    • listenToLocations

      public com.google.firebase.firestore.ListenerRegistration listenToLocations(@NonNull String eventId, @NonNull LocationRepository.LocationsCallback cb)
      Attaches a real-time listener to the attendee_locations subcollection. Fires immediately with the current snapshot and again on every change. Intended for use by the organizer dashboard. Store the returned ListenerRegistration and call registration.remove() in onDestroy() to avoid leaks.
      Parameters:
      eventId - the event to observe
      cb - callback that receives the full updated list of locations
      Returns:
      a ListenerRegistration that must be removed when done
